name: drawrect
creator: ews31415
description: Draw a rectangle given its horizontal length (h) and vertical length (v). If the horizontal and vertical lengths are equal, a square is drawn. The rectangle is centered at (0, 0). The screen is set up to fit the proportion of the 320 x 220 screen. The vertical axis ranges from y = -44 to y = 44 while the horizontal axis ranges from x = -64 to x = 64.
